currency_note: USD fields use IONOS' official localized USD price table at https://cloud.ionos.com/prices; EUR source prices are preserved in notes and are not converted locally.
method: IONOS AI Model Hub official USD pricing at https://cloud.ionos.com/prices, cross-checked against the EUR tables at https://cloud.ionos.de/preise and https://cloud.ionos.de/managed/ai-model-hub, plus the model catalog at https://docs.ionos.com/cloud/ai/ai-model-hub. OpenAI-compatible pay-per-use, EU-sovereign (DE). The 2026-07-22 text/code catalog has 9 models, incl. new Qwen3.5-397B-A17B and Qwen3.5-9B.
